nasb.text: But when David saw that his servants were whispering together, David perceived that the child was dead; so David said to his servants, “Is the child dead?” And they said, “He is dead.”

esv.text: But when David saw that his servants were whispering together, David understood that the child was dead. And David said to his servants, “Is the child dead?” They said, “He is dead.”

cnv.text: 大衛看見他的臣僕彼此低聲耳語，就知道孩子已經死了。他問臣僕說：“孩子死了嗎？”他們回答：“死了！”

ccb.text: 大卫看见他们交头接耳，知道孩子死了，便问他们：“孩子死了？”他们答道：“是的，他死了。”
